ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: torpido 69% (_Wheat_ flour, water, salt, yeast, vegetable fat, _soya_ flour, ascorbic acid, _sesame_ seeds), cheddar 13.9 %(cheese, _milk_), tomatoes 6.9%, lettuce leaves 6.9%, butter 3.4%
